context:
Evaluating a Coralogix support response for this user question:

Helm install of otel-integration fails with "admission webhook warden-validating.common-webhooks.networking.gke.io denied the request" and "denied by autogke-no-write-mode-hostpath". We're on GKE Autopilot. How do we deploy?

checklist.name: storecheckpoints-hostpath-write
checklist.description: The response matches the pattern: (?i)(storeCheckpoints|hostPath|write mode)

checklist.name: no-says-the-cluster-is-misconfigured-or-that
checklist.description: Explains that GKE Autopilot's Warden admission webhook blocks writable hostPath mounts, and points the user at the Autopilot-specific values file or at disabling the offending writable hostPath option (e.g. `storeCheckpoints`). A response that says the cluster is misconfigured or that the user should switch away from Autopilot is a FAIL.
